name: University of Oslo (UiO)
tuitionNote: Non-EU/EEA: NOK 130K-250K/yr (varies by programme). EU/EEA/Swiss: FREE, semester fee ~NOK 1,000 only. (uio.no)
bachelorRequirements: Norwegian Upper Secondary (or equivalent) + Norwegian language proficiency (B2) — most BSc programmes in Norwegian only
masterRequirements: Bachelor's degree (180 ECTS) + relevant field + IELTS 6.5 (no section <6.0) or TOEFL 90

name: University of Bergen (UiB)
tuitionNote: Non-EU/EEA: ~NOK 100K-200K/yr (varies by programme). EU/EEA/Swiss: FREE, semester fee ~NOK 1,000 only. (uib.no)
bachelorRequirements: Norwegian Upper Secondary (or equivalent) + Norwegian language proficiency (B2) — most BSc programmes in Norwegian only
masterRequirements: Bachelor's degree (180 ECTS) + relevant field + IELTS 6.5 (no section <6.0) or TOEFL 90

name: Norwegian University of Science and Technology (NTNU)
tuitionNote: Non-EU/EEA: NOK 176K-206K/yr (3-tier system by field). EU/EEA/Swiss: FREE, semester fee ~NOK 1,000 only. (ntnu.edu)
bachelorRequirements: Norwegian Upper Secondary (or equivalent) + Norwegian language proficiency (B2) — most BSc programmes in Norwegian only
masterRequirements: Bachelor's degree (180 ECTS) + relevant field + IELTS 6.5 (no section <5.5) or TOEFL 90

name: UiT The Arctic University of Norway
tuitionNote: Non-EU/EEA: ~NOK 80K-160K/yr (varies). EU/EEA/Swiss: FREE, semester fee ~NOK 1,000 only. (uit.no)
bachelorRequirements: Norwegian Upper Secondary (or equivalent) + Norwegian B2 — most BSc in Norwegian only
masterRequirements: Bachelor's degree (180 ECTS) + relevant field + IELTS 6.0-6.5 or TOEFL 80-90

name: Norwegian University of Life Sciences (NMBU)
tuitionNote: Non-EU/EEA: ~NOK 80K-150K/yr. EU/EEA/Swiss: FREE, semester fee ~NOK 1,000 only. (nmbu.no)
bachelorRequirements: Norwegian Upper Secondary (or equivalent) + Norwegian B2 — most BSc in Norwegian only
masterRequirements: Bachelor's degree (180 ECTS) + relevant field + IELTS 6.5 or TOEFL 90

tuitionNote: Non-EU/EEA: ~NOK 80K-160K/yr. EU/EEA/Swiss: FREE, semester fee ~NOK 1,000 only. (uis.no)
bachelorRequirements: Norwegian Upper Secondary (or equivalent) + Norwegian B2 — most BSc in Norwegian only
masterRequirements: Bachelor's degree (180 ECTS) + relevant field + IELTS 6.0-6.5 or TOEFL 80-90

name: University of Agder (UiA)
tuitionNote: Non-EU/EEA: ~NOK 80K-140K/yr. EU/EEA/Swiss: FREE, semester fee ~NOK 1,000 only. (uia.no)
bachelorRequirements: Norwegian Upper Secondary (or equivalent) + Norwegian B2 — BSc in Norwegian only
masterRequirements: Bachelor's degree (180 ECTS) + relevant field + IELTS 6.0 or TOEFL 80

name: Nord University
tuitionNote: Non-EU/EEA: ~NOK 80K-130K/yr. EU/EEA/Swiss: FREE, semester fee ~NOK 1,000 only. (nord.no)
bachelorRequirements: Norwegian Upper Secondary (or equivalent) + Norwegian B2 — BSc in Norwegian only
masterRequirements: Bachelor's degree (180 ECTS) + relevant field + IELTS 6.0 or TOEFL 80

name: OsloMet - Oslo Metropolitan University
tuitionNote: Non-EU/EEA: ~NOK 100K-180K/yr. EU/EEA/Swiss: FREE, semester fee ~NOK 1,000 only. (oslomet.no)
bachelorRequirements: Norwegian Upper Secondary (or equivalent) + Norwegian B2 — BSc in Norwegian only
masterRequirements: Bachelor's degree (180 ECTS) + relevant field + IELTS 6.0-6.5 or TOEFL 80-90

name: University of South-Eastern Norway (USN)
tuitionNote: Non-EU/EEA: ~NOK 80K-140K/yr. EU/EEA/Swiss: FREE, semester fee ~NOK 1,000 only. (usn.no)
bachelorRequirements: Norwegian Upper Secondary (or equivalent) + Norwegian B2 — BSc in Norwegian only
masterRequirements: Bachelor's degree (180 ECTS) + relevant field + IELTS 6.0 or TOEFL 80

name: NHH Norwegian School of Economics
tuitionNote: Non-EU/EEA: ~NOK 100K-150K/yr. EU/EEA/Swiss: FREE, semester fee ~NOK 1,000 only. (nhh.no)
bachelorRequirements: Norwegian Upper Secondary + Norwegian B2 + Maths R1/S1+S2 — BSc in Norwegian
masterRequirements: Bachelor's degree (180 ECTS) in Economics/Business + GMAT/GRE + IELTS 6.5 or TOEFL 90

name: BI Norwegian Business School
tuitionNote: Private: ALL students pay. BSc ~NOK 60K-90K/yr, MSc ~NOK 120K-190K/yr. (bi.no)
bachelorRequirements: Upper secondary + English proficiency (IELTS 6.0) — some BSc programmes in English
masterRequirements: Bachelor's degree (180 ECTS) + GMAT/GRE recommended + IELTS 6.5 or TOEFL 90

name: Western Norway University of Applied Sciences (HVL)
tuitionNote: Non-EU/EEA: ~NOK 80K-130K/yr. EU/EEA/Swiss: FREE, semester fee ~NOK 1,000 only. (hvl.no)
bachelorRequirements: Norwegian Upper Secondary (or equivalent) + Norwegian B2 — BSc in Norwegian only
masterRequirements: Bachelor's degree (180 ECTS) + relevant field + IELTS 6.0 or TOEFL 80

name: Inland Norway University of Applied Sciences (INN)
tuitionNote: Non-EU/EEA: ~NOK 80K-130K/yr. EU/EEA/Swiss: FREE, semester fee ~NOK 1,000 only. (inn.no)
bachelorRequirements: Norwegian Upper Secondary (or equivalent) + Norwegian B2 — BSc in Norwegian only
masterRequirements: Bachelor's degree (180 ECTS) + relevant field + IELTS 6.0 or TOEFL 80

name: Norwegian Academy of Music (NMH)
tuitionNote: Non-EU/EEA: ~NOK 80K-120K/yr. EU/EEA/Swiss: FREE, semester fee ~NOK 1,000 only. (nmh.no)
bachelorRequirements: Norwegian Upper Secondary + audition/portfolio + Norwegian B2
masterRequirements: Bachelor's in Music + audition + IELTS 6.0 or TOEFL 80

name: Oslo National Academy of the Arts (KHiO)
tuitionNote: Non-EU/EEA: ~NOK 80K-120K/yr. EU/EEA/Swiss: FREE, semester fee ~NOK 1,000 only. (khio.no)
bachelorRequirements: Norwegian Upper Secondary + portfolio/audition + Norwegian B2
masterRequirements: Bachelor's in Arts/Design + portfolio + IELTS 6.0

name: Norwegian School of Sport Sciences (NIH)
tuitionNote: Non-EU/EEA: ~NOK 80K-120K/yr. EU/EEA/Swiss: FREE, semester fee ~NOK 1,000 only. (nih.no)
bachelorRequirements: Norwegian Upper Secondary + physical entrance test + Norwegian B2
masterRequirements: Bachelor's in Sport Sciences + IELTS 6.0 or TOEFL 80

name: MF Norwegian School of Theology, Religion and Society
tuitionNote: Private institution. Low tuition ~NOK 15K-30K/yr for all students. (mf.no)
bachelorRequirements: Norwegian Upper Secondary + Norwegian B2
masterRequirements: Bachelor's degree (180 ECTS) + relevant field + IELTS 6.0

name: VID Specialized University
tuitionNote: Private institution. BSc ~NOK 15K-20K/yr, MSc ~NOK 30K-50K/yr. (vid.no)
bachelorRequirements: Norwegian Upper Secondary + Norwegian B2
masterRequirements: Bachelor's degree (180 ECTS) + relevant field + IELTS 6.0

name: NLA University College
tuitionNote: Private Christian institution. Low tuition ~NOK 15K-30K/yr for all students. (nla.no)
bachelorRequirements: Norwegian Upper Secondary + Norwegian B2
masterRequirements: Bachelor's degree (180 ECTS) + IELTS 6.0

name: Molde University College (HiMolde)
tuitionNote: Non-EU/EEA: ~NOK 70K-110K/yr. EU/EEA/Swiss: FREE, semester fee ~NOK 1,000 only. (himolde.no)
bachelorRequirements: Norwegian Upper Secondary + Norwegian B2 — BSc in Norwegian
masterRequirements: Bachelor's degree (180 ECTS) + IELTS 6.0 or TOEFL 80

name: Volda University College (HVO)
tuitionNote: Non-EU/EEA: ~NOK 70K-110K/yr. EU/EEA/Swiss: FREE, semester fee ~NOK 1,000 only. (hivolda.no)
bachelorRequirements: Norwegian Upper Secondary + Norwegian B2 — BSc in Norwegian
masterRequirements: Bachelor's degree (180 ECTS) + IELTS 6.0

name: Sámi University of Applied Sciences (SAMAS)
tuitionNote: Tuition-free for ALL students (including non-EU). Semester fee ~NOK 1,000 only. (samas.no)
bachelorRequirements: Norwegian/Sámi Upper Secondary + Sámi/Norwegian language proficiency
masterRequirements: Bachelor's degree + Sámi language/culture background

name: Norwegian Police University College (PHS)
tuitionNote: Government-funded. Tuition-free. Semester fee ~NOK 1,000. Norwegian citizenship/residency required. (phs.no)
bachelorRequirements: Norwegian citizenship/residency + Norwegian B2 + physical fitness test + security clearance
masterRequirements: BSc in Policing/Law + Norwegian fluency + police employment

name: Norwegian Defence University College (FHS)
tuitionNote: Military institution. Tuition-free, open to Norwegian Armed Forces personnel. (forsvaret.no)
bachelorRequirements: Military service + Norwegian citizenship + security clearance
masterRequirements: Military officer qualification + relevant experience

name: Kristiania University College
tuitionNote: Private. ALL students pay. BSc ~NOK 50K-80K/yr, MSc ~NOK 70K-100K/yr. (kristiania.no)
bachelorRequirements: Upper secondary + IELTS 6.0 (English-taught programmes available)
masterRequirements: Bachelor's degree (180 ECTS) + IELTS 6.0-6.5

name: Østfold University College (HiØ)
tuitionNote: Non-EU/EEA: ~NOK 70K-110K/yr. EU/EEA/Swiss: FREE, semester fee ~NOK 1,000 only. (hiof.no)
bachelorRequirements: Norwegian Upper Secondary + Norwegian B2 — BSc in Norwegian only
masterRequirements: Bachelor's degree (180 ECTS) + IELTS 6.0

name: Norwegian School of Veterinary Science (merged into NMBU)
tuitionNote: Now part of NMBU. Non-EU/EEA: ~NOK 100K-180K/yr. EU/EEA/Swiss: FREE. (nmbu.no/vet)
bachelorRequirements: N/A — Veterinary programme is 5.5-year integrated degree
masterRequirements: BSc in Veterinary/Animal Science + Norwegian B2 + IELTS 6.5

name: Bergen Academy of Art and Design (KHiB, now part of UiB)
tuitionNote: Now Faculty of Fine Art at UiB. Non-EU/EEA: ~NOK 80K-150K/yr. EU/EEA/Swiss: FREE. (uib.no)
bachelorRequirements: Portfolio/audition + Norwegian Upper Secondary + Norwegian B2
masterRequirements: Bachelor's in Art/Design + portfolio + IELTS 6.0
